task: Use einsum to perform standard matrix multiplication A @ B
error_location: line 1: B.T transposes B, changing the operation
clarification_query: What einsum string performs A @ B (standard matmul) without transposing B?
explanation: 'ij,jk->ik' sums over j (the shared dimension) producing (i,k). Passing B.T changes the semantics to 'ij,kj->ik'.
